testcase.name: test_evite_greeting_card_create_new

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_greeting_card_create_new.TestEviteGreetingCardCreateNew object at 0x7f2848dfc560> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7f284871e420>
def test_evite_greeting_card_create_new(self, config): """ Create Greeting Card as new registered user
:param config: :return: """ _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] evite_gallery_page = config.pages["evite_gallery_page"] evite_overview = config.pages["evite_overview"] evite_greeting_card = config.pages["evite_greeting_card"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_egift_card = config.pages["step2_egift_card"] step3_grc_messages = config.pages["step3_grc_messages"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
evite_gallery_page.select_mega_nav(action="greeting_cards", url="cards") evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(greeting_card=True)
# step1_template.select_next(url="egift-card") # step2_egift_card.select_egift_card_toggle(toggle=False)

testcase.name: test_evite_rsvp_premium

failure.message: Exception: Can't verify page url contains details, current url: https://test23.evitelabs.com/invitation/string-lights/create?v=&c=featured&previous=featured&page=1&invitation_type=invitation&invitation_type=premium&category_id=featured&pos=7

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fdb949fb830> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fdb94336480>
def test_evite_rsvp_premium(self, config): _test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"] step6_review_send = config.pages["step6_review_send"]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(_test_name) psql_db = PostgreSQL(_test_name)
# Logger logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(_test_name) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav("create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(["premium"])
# Pick up a random template from the template page evite_gallery_page.select_random_template(premium=True)
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(test_name=_test_name) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time(premium=True) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
# Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) > step1_template.select_next(url="details")
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_premium' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fdb94336480> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7fdb94334980> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7fdb9433c110> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7fdb94334c80> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_premium (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7fdb94334e00> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7fdb943364b0> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7fdb943343e0> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7fdb94eab230> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7fdb94946420> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7fdb943348c0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_premium.TestEviteRSVPPremium object at 0x7fdb949fb830> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7fdb94335b80> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7fdb94336450> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7fdb94336570> step6_review_send = <commons.pages.evite.step6_review_send.Step6ReviewSend object at 0x7fdb94336510> user_email_addr = 'evite-02032026-110413-14-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_whos_coming_module.WhosComingModule object at 0x7fdb94337140>

testcase.name: test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event

skipped.message: Could not find a past event with this user.

testcase.skipped: /var/lib/jenkins/workspace/qa-evite-test-tests-acceptance/webdriver-framework/tests/evite_acceptance/test_evite_greeting_card_create_from_past_event.py:149: Could not find a past event with this user.

testcase.name: test_evite_rsvp_free

failure.message: Exception: Can't verify page url contains details, current url: https://test23.evitelabs.com/invitation/library-slip/create?template=library-slip&event_type=featured&c=featured&previous=featured&page=1&invitation_type=invitation&invitation_type=free&category_id=featured&pos=6

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7fcd26d833e0> config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fcd267265d0>
def test_evite_rsvp_free(self, config): """ New Creation Flow with Fabric Templates
Create Event, RSVP guests, Yes, No. Email and/or Phone.
Verify guest in Guest List Verify RSVP in Manage Invitation Dashboard
:param config: :return: """
_test_name = inspect.stack()[0][3]
quake_v3_event = QuakeV3Event(inspect.stack()[0][3]) psql_db = PostgreSQL(inspect.stack()[0][3])
page = config.pages["page"]
evite_home_page = config.pages["evite_home_page"]
rsvp_modal = config.pages["rsvp_modal"] event_details = config.pages["event_details"] who_is_coming = config.pages["who_is_coming"] login_modal = config.pages["login_modal"] my_events = config.pages["my_events"]
step1_template = config.pages["step1_template"] step2_event_details = config.pages["step2_event_details"] step5_guests = config.pages["step5_guests"]
logger = LoggingConfig().initialize_logger(inspect.stack()[0][3]) logger.info(f"Start {_test_name}")
page.get_url(environment=config.environment)
# Sign-In or Register user_email_addr, user_pass, host = login_modal.sign_in_register(test_data=self._json_test_data)
# Create Invitation evite_gallery_page = evite_home_page.select_nav(action="create_invitation") evite_gallery_page.select_filter_by(actions=["free"]) evite_event_page = evite_gallery_page.select_random_template()
self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["event_title"] = Utils().get_event_title() self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_date"] = Utils().get_rand_date(inspect.stack()[0][3]) self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["start_time"] = Utils().get_start_time()
if host: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = host else: self._json_test_data["invitation"]["event_details"]["host"] = ( f"{self._json_test_data['register']['first_name']} " f"{self._json_test_data['register']['last_name']}" )
# Step 1: Card Editor step1_template.fill_text_editors(test_data=self._json_test_data) > step1_template.select_next(url="details")
_test_name = 'test_evite_rsvp_free' config = <commons.test_configuration.TestConfiguration object at 0x7fcd267265d0> event_details = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_event_details_module.EventDetailsModule object at 0x7fcd26724b00> evite_event_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_event_page.EviteEventPage object at 0x7fcd2672e030> evite_gallery_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_gallery_page.EviteGalleryPage object at 0x7fcd2672f5c0> evite_home_page = <commons.pages.evite.evite_home_page.EviteHomePage object at 0x7fcd26724800> host = 'automation test' logger = <Logger test_evite_rsvp_free (INFO)> login_modal = <commons.pages.evite.login_modal.LoginModal object at 0x7fcd26726540> my_events = <commons.pages.evite.my_events.MyEvents object at 0x7fcd26726450> page = <commons.page.Page object at 0x7fcd26724440> psql_db = <lib.postgre_sql.PostgreSQL object at 0x7fcd26e05d30> quake_v3_event = <commons.pages.quake_v3.quake_v3_event.QuakeV3Event object at 0x7fcd2833cb00> rsvp_modal = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_rsvp_modal.RSVPModal object at 0x7fcd267245f0> self = <tests.evite_acceptance.test_evite_rsvp_free.TestEviteRSVPFree object at 0x7fcd26d833e0> step1_template = <commons.pages.evite.step1_template.Step1Template object at 0x7fcd26727da0> step2_event_details = <commons.pages.evite.step2_event_details.Step2EventDetails object at 0x7fcd267242f0> step5_guests = <commons.pages.evite.step5_guests.Step5Guests object at 0x7fcd26724d40> user_email_addr = 'evite-02032026-110418-68-test@evitetest.com' user_pass = 'test1234' who_is_coming = <commons.pages.evite.evite_view_invitation_whos_coming_module.WhosComingModule object at 0x7fcd267248f0>

def log_and_raise_exception(self, message): """ Uses logger to log exception and then raises Exception error :param message: Message to log and raise :return: """ self.logger.exception(message) > raise Exception(message) E Exception: Can't verify page url contains details, current url: https://test23.evitelabs.com/invitation/library-slip/create?template=library-slip&event_type=featured&c=featured&previous=featured&page=1&invitation_type=invitation&invitation_type=free&category_id=featured&pos=6
